actions.title: Install Visual C++ Redistributable
actions.description: Install vcrun2019 via Winetricks to provide Microsoft Visual C++ 2019 runtime libraries.
actions.whatWillChange: Installs Microsoft Visual C++ 2019 runtime libraries into the bottle
actions.undoPath: Remove via Winetricks or recreate bottle

actions.title: Install .NET Runtime
actions.description: Install dotnet48 via Winetricks to provide .NET Framework 4.8 runtime.
actions.whatWillChange: Installs .NET Framework 4.8 runtime into the bottle
actions.undoPath: Remove via Winetricks or recreate bottle

actions.title: Install DirectX Redistributable
actions.description: Install DirectX End-User Runtime via Winetricks to provide missing DirectX DLLs.
actions.whatWillChange: Installs DirectX runtime libraries (d3dx9, xinput, xaudio2) into the bottle
actions.undoPath: Remove via Winetricks or recreate bottle

actions.title: Switch Graphics Backend
actions.description: Toggle between Apple D3DMetal and DXVK graphics backends to resolve rendering issues.
actions.whatWillChange: Changes the DirectX translation layer used for rendering
actions.undoPath: Switch back to the previous backend in Graphics settings

actions.title: Force DirectX 11 Mode
actions.description: Force the game to use DirectX 11 instead of DirectX 12, which has better compatibility on macOS.
actions.whatWillChange: Forces the game to use D3D11 instead of D3D12

actions.title: Disable Ray Tracing
actions.description: Disable DXR (DirectX Raytracing) to improve stability on macOS.
actions.whatWillChange: Disables ray tracing features which may cause GPU crashes

actions.title: Recreate Wine Prefix
actions.description: Delete and recreate the Wine prefix to fix corruption issues. This will reset all bottle settings.
actions.whatWillChange: Deletes the entire Wine prefix and recreates it from scratch
actions.undoPath: Not reversible; back up save files before proceeding

actions.title: Check Network Configuration
actions.description: Network or TLS errors may indicate connectivity issues or missing certificates.
actions.whatWillChange: No automatic changes; review network settings and retry

actions.title: Anti-Cheat Not Supported
actions.description: This game uses kernel-level anti-cheat that is not supported on macOS through Wine. Consider playing in offline mode if available.
actions.whatWillChange: No fix available; anti-cheat requires Windows kernel support
